stemHtml: Which of these statements is correct about a flight crew oxygen mask?

options.a: When switched to the position 100% oxygen is always supplied with some overpressure.
options.b: Below a certain altitude the oxygen mask switches automatically to “constant flow”.
options.c: In the position “NORMAL” oxygen is mixed with air from outside the mask.
options.d: When selected to the position “EMERGENCY” oxygen is supplied with some overpressure above a certain altitude.
